title: Choose the Brain (LLM) for Your Agent
lede: Pick the model that powers your Smart Agent's replies. Learn the difference between realtime (speech-to-speech) models and text (LLM + transcriber) models, and how to configure each.

steps.title: Open the Brains (LLM) Panel
steps.content:
1. Go to Intelligence Center → Smart Agents and open your agent.
  2. In the middle column, click the Brains (LLM) panel. The pill shows the current provider and model.

images.caption: The Brains (LLM) panel: choose the model that powers replies.
The Brains (LLM) panel: choose the model that powers replies.

steps.title: Understand the Two Model Types
steps.content:
• Realtime models (grouped under Realtime Agent): a single model handles audio in and audio out (speech-to-speech). Turn detection and transcription are built in.
  • Text (LLM) models: the flow is Speech → Text → LLM → Voice. These pair with a separate Transcriber (STT) for speech recognition and a Voice (TTS) for the reply.

images.caption: Text models use separate Transcriber (STT) and Voice (TTS) panels.
Text models use separate Transcriber (STT) and Voice (TTS) panels.

steps.title: Configure the Transcriber (Text Models)
steps.content:
1. When you choose a text LLM, open the Transcriber (STT) panel.
  2. Pick the transcription provider and set the input language for accurate recognition.
  3. You can also set a backup transcriber that takes over if the primary is unavailable.

steps.title: Advanced LLM Parameters (Optional)
steps.content:
• Open Advanced LLM Parameters to fine-tune behavior: Max Tool Steps, Parallel Tool Calls, Top-P, Max Output Tokens, and penalties.
  • Note: with a realtime model, some advanced interruption settings are ignored - the model manages turns itself.

nextSteps.title: What's Next?
nextSteps.description: Match the voice and behavior to your chosen model:

cards.title: Configure the Voice
cards.description: Pick a TTS voice for text models or the model's built-in voice.

cards.title: Agent Settings
cards.description: Tune interruptions, turn detection, and timeouts.

cards.title: Test Your Agent
cards.description: Compare models live to find the best fit.

support.title: Need Help?
support.content:
